info.name: Deck Recurrence
info.description:
Create Deck cards on a schedule. Define a template card and a recurrence rule (daily, weekly, monthly or any RFC 5545 RRULE) and Deck Recurrence will clone the template into the stack of your choice when each occurrence is due, with the due date set to the occurrence time. Labels, assignees and the description are carried over from the template.
Requires the Deck app to be installed and enabled.
info.author: Fatih AKTAS
